title: August 20
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}

'''August 20''' is the 232nd day of the year (233rd in leap years). There are 133 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1910s#1915|1915]] – [[George Roussos]] is born.
*[[1950s#1951|1951]] – [[Greg Bear]] is born.
*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[James Marsters]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Mark Haigh-Hutchinson]] is born.
*[[1988]] – [[Nikki SooHoo]] is born.
*[[1997]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 3|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 3]] published.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Jedi: Aayla Secura]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – ''[[Star Wars: I Want to Be a Jedi (2007)|Star Wars: I Want to Be a Jedi]]'' published {{C|Hardcover, paperback}}
*[[2008]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 32|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 32]] published.
*[[2014]] – [[Darth Maul—Son of Dathomir 4|''Darth Maul—Son of Dathomir'' 4]] published.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Rey and Pals]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars Vol. 11: The Scourging of Shu-Torun]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Bad Batch, Volume 2 (Episodes 9-16)]]'' released.
*[[2024]] – ''[[Star Wars: Mace Windu – The Twilight Run]]'' published.
*[[2025]] – [[Star Wars (2025) 4|''Star Wars'' (2025) 4]] published.
